description_long: This is an adult pedestrian with a medium build, standing upright with arms relaxed at the sides. The individual has long, loose hair that extends past the shoulders and wears glasses. The clothing consists of a short-sleeve t-shirt featuring a colorful graphic on the chest, paired with fitted jeans and sturdy shoes. The facial features are defined, and the overall appearance suggests a casual, urban style suitable for city environments. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the posture is neutral and relaxed.
description: A casually dressed adult pedestrian with long hair, glasses, a graphic t-shirt, jeans, and sturdy shoes, standing upright in a relaxed pose.
description_view_0: Front view showing the graphic t-shirt, facial features, glasses, and relaxed arm position.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the length and flow of the hair, and the side of the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head with long hair, the back of the t-shirt and jeans, and the overall stance.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, hair, and the relaxed position of the arms and hands.
